winning isnt the goal, seeing sub optimal builds do fun things is :)

new to this mode and its a bit overwhelming (although i really like it)
what should i need to know to get started? what works well together and dont work at all?

there are several ways to win and several ways to counter it:
- a lineup that one does tons of burst damage - counter it with barriers and disrupting their carry
- a lineup that does damage over time - counter with dispells
- a lineup that builds up power and kills in late game - kill them faster or snipe key units

You can have a limited amount of offence and defence options at once, so in regular mode you just kinda hope that things will go way and oppoent won't have units to counter you. That's why draft mode is better - you build the strategy on the go each time and it is less random than just getting a good/bad matchup in regular mode.

I'd say fastest way to learn is to go in and play. You will face tons of bots until you hit like 1000 points, so no shame in losing. See what enemy does, try to copy it if they win. Keep repeating and you will eventually learn the best strategies
